starry_unigraph.providers.dtdg_loaders module

Flare runtime loader: wraps STGraphLoader with split management.

FlareRuntimeLoader is the bridge between the session’s DTDGProvider and the underlying STGraphLoader. It handles train/val/test split computation, chunk-order / chunk-decay configuration, and provides iter_train / iter_eval / iter_predict iterators that yield either STGraphBlob (training) or DTDGBatch (eval/predict).

class starry_unigraph.providers.dtdg_loaders.FlareRuntimeLoader(partition_id: int, route_plan: SnapshotRoutePlan, window_state: DTDGWindowState, partition_data: PartitionData, graph_loader: STGraphLoader, device: str, rank: int, world_size: int, chunk_index: torch.Tensor, train_chunk_order: Any = None, train_chunk_decay: list[int] = <factory>, train_num_full_snaps: int = 1, split_ratio: dict[str, float] | None = None, cursor: int = 0)[source]

Bases: object

High-level loader managing splits, chunk ordering, and iteration.

Wraps a PartitionData + STGraphLoader and exposes three iteration modes:

  • iter_train() — yields STGraphBlob (multi-frame, with chunk-decay support).

  • iter_eval() — yields DTDGBatch with chain="snapshot_warmup" for pre-train snapshots and chain="snapshot_eval" for actual validation.

  • iter_predict() — same structure as eval but with chain="snapshot_predict".

Created via from_partition_data() which parses config for window size, chunk order, chunk decay, split ratio, etc.

Example:

loader = FlareRuntimeLoader.from_partition_data(
    data=part, device="cuda:0", rank=0, world_size=1,
    config=session_config,
)
for blob in loader.iter_train():
    result = run_flare_train_step(runtime, blob, {})
build_snapshot_index() → dict[str, Any][source]
chunk_index: torch.Tensor
cursor: int = 0
describe_route_cache() → dict[str, Any][source]
describe_window_state() → dict[str, Any][source]
device: str
dump_state() → dict[str, Any][source]
classmethod from_partition_data(data: PartitionData, device: str, rank: int, world_size: int, config: dict[str, Any]) → FlareRuntimeLoader[source]

Build a FlareRuntimeLoader from a PartitionData and session config.

Parses config["model"]["window"]["size"], config["dtdg"]["chunk_order"], config["dtdg"]["chunk_decay"], config["data"]["split_ratio"], etc.

Args:

data: Loaded PartitionData for this rank’s partition. device: Target device string (e.g. "cuda:0"). rank: Distributed rank. world_size: Distributed world size. config: Full session config dict.

Returns:

A configured FlareRuntimeLoader.

graph_loader: STGraphLoader
iter_eval(split: str = 'val') → Iterable[DTDGBatch][source]
iter_predict(split: str = 'test') → Iterable[DTDGBatch][source]
iter_train(split: str = 'train') → Iterable[Any][source]
load_block(snapshot_index: int) → DGLBlock[source]
load_snapshot(snapshot_index: int, split: str) → DTDGBatch[source]
partition_data: PartitionData
partition_id: int
rank: int
route_plan: SnapshotRoutePlan
split_ratio: dict[str, float] | None = None
train_chunk_decay: list[int]
train_chunk_order: Any = None
train_num_full_snaps: int = 1
window_state: DTDGWindowState
world_size: int
